title: Crosslink init: document blocked actions and lint checks in default commands

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--init-blocked-lint
comments.content:
Plan: Two changes needed in the resource templates (not init.rs itself, since templates are embedded via include_str!):

1. **global.md** — Add a 'Blocked Actions' section documenting commands blocked by work-check.py (git push/merge/rebase/reset/etc.), gated commands (git commit requires active issue), and directing agents to ask the user for manual steps instead of attempting blocked commands. This goes into the rules that get injected into every agent's context.

2. **kickoff.md** — Add lint/format check instructions to the agent prompt template. In step 8 (test suite), also include running the project's linter and formatter (cargo clippy/fmt, eslint, ruff, etc.) before committing. This ensures subagents always lint before marking work complete.

Key files to modify:
- crosslink/resources/crosslink/rules/global.md (blocked actions documentation)
- crosslink/resources/claude/commands/kickoff.md (lint instructions in agent prompt)

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--init-blocked-lint
comments.content:
Result: Implemented both changes:

1. global.md - Added 'Blocked Actions' subsection under Priority 1: Security documenting permanently blocked git commands (push/merge/rebase/reset/etc.), gated commands (commit requires active issue), and always-allowed read-only commands.

2. kickoff.md - Three additions:
   a. Blocked actions context block in the agent prompt (alongside worktree awareness)
   b. Step 8b: lint/format check instructions with per-language examples (cargo clippy/fmt, eslint, ruff, go vet/gofmt)
   c. Self-review checklist: added lint/formatter pass item

All 146 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--init-blocked-lint
comments.content: Committed: feat: document blocked actions and add lint checks to init templates | Files: 2 files changed, 38 insertions(+)

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--init-blocked-lint
comments.content: Final: wrote DONE to .kickoff-status. All kickoff steps complete.
